JIL SANDER couple's logo micro-hoodie with zip closure, originating from the pioneer of minimalist fashion. This design embodies the essence of minimalism, even when following trend trends, the brand maintains its minimalist identity. The design is kept simple yet impactful, defining what "minimalism" truly means. It is very much in line with the JIL SANDER style, iconic and classic, released every season. The ribbed cuffs, oversized silhouette, and relaxed fit exude a casual vibe, suitable for wearing alone or layering for a unique style. Available in sizes M-3XL. Size details: M: Sleeve length 78cm, Bust 138cm, Length 64cm. L: Sleeve length 79cm, Bust 142cm, Length 66cm. XL: Sleeve length 80cm, Bust 146cm, Length 68cm. 2XL: Sleeve length 81cm, Bust 150cm, Length 70cm. 3XL: Sleeve length 82cm, Bust 154cm, Length 72cm.

JIL SANDER's new spring/summer unisex short-sleeve T-shirt is likely associated with outdoor brands like Canada Goose and Patagonia. Apart from its adept design, its expertise lies in its unique and deep understanding of fabrics. Through continuous research and problem-solving, particularly in fabric innovation, it has established itself as a leading brand in the clothing industry. This T-shirt is made of airy cotton material, meticulously blended for a smooth and soft texture, offering both natural beauty and comfort. The clean and simple cut of the garment showcases a distinct and hazy structural beauty in the fabric. Custom-made with exclusive molds, the fabric tests the skills of the workers, ensuring a smooth and wrinkle-free finish. The logo design is crafted with precision, demanding exceptional craftsmanship. This T-shirt caters to men who seek refinement in their lifestyle. Sizes range from S to XL.

G JIL SANDER new double-layer heavy-duty short-sleeved T-shirt with letter print. The letter pattern, whether on a T-shirt or hoodie, is a popular item every year. The large area of front print uses high-cost direct spray printing from the large Kangde digital printer. After multiple adjustments and color matching, the color reproduction is close to the original version. Different from the market's inferior offset printing versions, it requires a lot of work hours. The fabric is made of exclusive custom dyed cotton double yarn. Sizes: M (weight - kg), L (weight kg), XL (weight - kg), XXL (weight - kg), XXXL (weight - kg). Available in black and white. Suitable for wearing - kg, XL for loose fit.

Jil* Retro Filter~Two-Tone Washed Loose Fit OS Short Sleeve T-shirt. This two-tone washed short sleeve by Jil Sander is the "master of relaxation" in the fashion world! The loose OS silhouette is casual and carefree, perfect for a lazy day out or a laid-back style. The classic black-gray and khaki tones with a retro filter effect and washed craftsmanship exude a high-end feel in every detail. The prominent brand logo on the chest showcases unique taste, making you the center of attention effortlessly. Made of 100% cotton fabric, it is skin-friendly, breathable, and lightweight for summer wear, providing a soft touch like a gentle embrace. Whether paired with casual pants for a relaxed daily look or mixed with denim for a cool and stylish vibe, it effortlessly enhances your outfit with endless possibilities. Colors: Charcoal Gray, Khaki. Sizes: XS-L. Exclusively available.

JIL SANDER washed pure cotton short-sleeved T-shirt, a gentle companion for summer days! In the scorching summer, finding a comfortable and stylish piece of clothing, a washed pure cotton short-sleeve is undoubtedly an excellent choice. Made of 100% pure cotton, it has good moisture absorption and breathability. When sweat soaks in, it won't stick to the skin like synthetic fabrics, but quickly absorbs and dissipates moisture, keeping the skin dry at all times. Just like a gentle breeze passing by on a hot afternoon, taking away the heat and discomfort. Its soft touch, like touching a cloud, gently fits the skin, providing an unparalleled comfortable experience. This skin-friendly fabric won't irritate the skin, feeling like a second layer of skin. Sizes: XS-L.

Item number: ARC'TERYX x BEAMS BETA JACKET, a cutting-edge outdoor functional hardshell jacket with the latest color-blocking design for FW. Worn by celebrities like Liu Wen, Li Xian, and Bai Jingting. Top-tier version with meticulous craftsmanship, using custom-dyed Gore-Tex high-density fabric. Features seamless three-layer bonding with full adhesive technology for superior breathability and waterproofing. Enhanced with three additional processes for comfort, wrinkle resistance, and style, meeting national standards for wind, rain, static electricity, fire, and mold resistance. Intricate embroidery with synthetic thread and Japanese machine stitching. Durable zippers with smooth operation. Impeccable tailoring and laser-cut pockets with heat-sealed waterproofing. Limited edition collaboration between Arc'Teryx and BEAMS, combining functionality with urban style. Available in sizes S to XL in earth tones inspired by natural landscapes.

JIL SANDER washed pure cotton short-sleeved T-shirt, a gentle companion for summer days! In the scorching summer, finding a comfortable and stylish piece of clothing, a washed pure cotton short-sleeve is undoubtedly an excellent choice. Made of 100% pure cotton, it has good moisture absorption and breathability. When sweat soaks in, it won't stick to the skin like synthetic fabrics, but quickly absorbs and dissipates moisture, keeping the skin dry at all times. Just like a gentle breeze passing by on a hot afternoon, taking away the heat and discomfort. Its soft touch, like touching a cloud, gently fits the skin, providing an unparalleled comfortable experience. This skin-friendly fabric won't irritate the skin, feeling like a second layer of skin. Sizes: XS-L.
